name: Crab Meat Alma
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Sm bunch chopped green onion
recipeInstructions:
1 Melt butter in a heavy saucepot.
2 Saute the vegetables until soft.
3 Blend in flour and add cream. Heat until thickened.
4 Add cheese and heat until it has melted.
5 Add wine, cayenne pepper, and salt. Fold in crab meat or shrimp.
6 Heat gently for 8 to 10 minutes. Serve with French bread or in patty shells.
